action.text:
x = lambda a : a + 10
print(x(5))
x = lambda a, b : a * b
print(x(5, 6))

numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
doubled = list(map(lambda x: x * 2, numbers)) # map() applies a function to every item in an iterable
print(doubled)

numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8]
odd_numbers = list(filter(lambda x: x % 2 != 0, numbers)) # filter() creates a list of items for which a function returns True
print(odd_numbers)
